title: Strait of Hormuz shutdown: A visual guide to world's most critical oil chokepoint
summary: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz following the Iran war outbreak in February has severely disrupted global trade and triggered a major energy shock. The data illustrates the strategic importance of this critical oil chokepoint to the world economy.
content: Data shows how the outbreak of the Iran war in February and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz saw trade grind to a halt, triggering a severe global energy shock.

zh.title: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭：世界最关键油气枢纽的可视化指南
zh.summary: 二月伊朗战争爆发后，霍尔木兹海峡的关闭严重中断了全球贸易，引发了重大能源危机。数据显示了这一关键油气枢纽对全球经济的战略重要性。

title: Blue Origin rocket explodes on launchpad during ground test
summary: Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin experienced a major setback when its New Glenn rocket exploded during a ground test on Thursday. The incident marks a significant failure for the aerospace company's launch ambitions.
content: Jeff Bezos' rocket maker suffered a setback on Thursday as its New Glenn rocket went up in flames.

zh.title: Blue Origin火箭在地面测试期间在发射台上爆炸
zh.summary: 周四，杰夫·贝索斯的Blue Origin公司在地面测试中遭遇重大挫折，其New Glenn火箭爆炸。这起事件标志着这家航空航天公司发射计划的重大失败。

title: Nvidia is investing billions into this emerging technology that could change the AI industry
summary: Nvidia is investing billions into photonics technology, which offers greater efficiency than traditional electrical data transfer methods. This investment could prove crucial to advancing AI infrastructure and capabilities.
content: Photonics is considered to be a more efficient alternative to the current process of transferring data using electricity, which could be crucial to the AI boom.

zh.title: 英伟达投入数十亿美元开发这项新兴技术，可能改变人工智能行业
zh.summary: 英伟达正投入数十亿美元到光子学技术中，该技术比传统电气数据传输方法具有更高的效率。这项投资对于推进人工智能基础设施和能力可能至关重要。

title: I was at the exclusive launch of Ferrari's new EV that sent the stock tumbling. But there may be light at the end of the tunnel
summary: Ferrari unveiled its first electric vehicle at an exclusive launch event, though the announcement initially caused the company's stock to decline. The article suggests potential optimism may still emerge for the EV initiative.
content: Is there a "luce" at the end of the tunnel for Ferrari's first electric vehicle?

zh.title: 我在法拉利新款电动车独家发布会现场，该车导致股价暴跌。但隧道尽头可能还有曙光
zh.summary: 法拉利在独家发布会上推出了首款电动汽车，但该公告最初导致公司股价下跌。这篇文章表明，电动车计划可能仍有乐观前景。

title: The ECB is in a bind over rate hikes — the private sector could be doing the bank's job for it
summary: The European Central Bank faces pressure as market expectations for interest rate hikes have already tightened financial and lending conditions across the private sector. The situation suggests the market is effectively forcing monetary tightening before official ECB action.
content: Market expectations that the European Central Bank will hike interest rates this year have already contributed to tighter financial and lending conditions.

zh.title: 欧洲央行在加息问题上陷入困境——私人部门可能在代行央行的职责
zh.summary: 欧洲央行面临压力，因为市场对加息的预期已经在私人部门收紧了金融和借贷条件。这种情况表明市场在欧洲央行官方行动前就已经有效地推动了货币紧缩。

title: Innovent Biologics shares rise 10% after pact with Pfizer of up to $10.5 billion
summary: Innovent Biologics' shares rose 10% following a strategic global licensing and collaboration agreement with Pfizer valued at up to $10.5 billion for oncology drug development. The partnership demonstrates significant investor confidence in the biotech company.
content: Innovent Biologics rose as much as 10%, after entering a strategic global licensing and collaboration agreement with Pfizer to develop oncology medicines.

zh.title: 创新生物与辉瑞签署最高105亿美元协议后股价上升10%
zh.summary: 创新生物公司在与辉瑞达成价值最高105亿美元的全球许可和合作协议后股价上升了10%，该协议用于肿瘤药物开发。该伙伴关系显示投资者对这家生物技术公司充满信心。

title: Blue Origin rocket explodes into huge ball of flame on Florida launch pad
summary: Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin suffered a major explosion during a launch test at its Florida facility, with the Amazon billionaire describing it as a very rough day. The incident represents a significant setback for the company's rocket development program.
content: Amazon billionaire Jeff Bezos, who founded Blue Origin, said it was a "very rough day".

zh.title: 蓝色起源火箭在佛罗里达发射台爆炸成巨大火球
zh.summary: 杰夫·贝索斯的蓝色起源公司在其佛罗里达设施的发射测试中遭遇重大爆炸,这位亚马逊亿万富翁将其描述为非常糟糕的一天。这一事件对该公司的火箭开发项目构成了重大挫折。

title: LG Electronics' shares surge 24% after showing automotive innovations using Google tech
summary: LG Electronics' stock surged 24% after the company unveiled automotive innovations developed using Google technology. The announcement marks significant progress in LG's automotive sector expansion.
content: Shares of LG Electronics surged after it unveiled automotive innovations using Google technology.

zh.title: LG电子股价上涨24% 展示采用谷歌技术的汽车创新
zh.summary: LG电子公司在推出采用谷歌技术开发的汽车创新产品后,股价上涨了24%。该公告标志着LG汽车部门扩张取得重大进展。

title: Samsung's shares surge as much as 6% after company ships next-generation AI memory chip samples
summary: Samsung Electronics' shares gained as much as 6% after the company began shipping HBM4E next-generation AI memory chip samples globally. The development underscores Samsung's leadership in advanced semiconductor technology for AI applications.
content: Shares of Samsung Electronics surged after the company began shipping HBM4E chip samples to its customers globally.

zh.title: 三星股价上涨6% 推出下一代AI内存芯片样品
zh.summary: 三星电子公司在全球开始销售HBM4E下一代AI内存芯片样品后,股价上涨了6%。这一发展凸显了三星在AI应用先进半导体技术方面的领导地位。

title: Asia’s rich fear losing the family fortune — but many still have no succession plans, survey shows
summary: A Lombard Odier survey reveals that while Asia's wealthy families prioritize preserving fortunes across generations, many still lack basic succession plans. The gap highlights a significant vulnerability for family wealth management in the region.
content: Asia's wealthy families want to preserve their fortunes across generations, but many still lack basic succession plans, according to a new Lombard Odier survey.

zh.title: 亚洲富人担心失去家族财富——但许多人仍没有继承计划,调查显示
zh.summary: 一份瑞银集团调查显示,虽然亚洲富裕家族优先考虑代代相传地保护财富,但许多家族仍然缺乏基本的继承计划。这一差距凸显了该地区家族财富管理的重大漏洞。

title: I’m setting up brokerage accounts for my grandkids in my daughter’s name. Is that wise — or am I asking for trouble?
summary: The article discusses considerations for setting up brokerage accounts for grandchildren in a parent's name, with investments in diversified equity funds including the S&P 500. It explores the potential risks and financial implications of this approach.
content: “The contributions are invested in mutual funds tracking the S&P 500, small-cap stocks and international equities.”

zh.title: 我在女儿的名义下为孙子女建立经纪账户。这样做明智吗——还是在自找麻烦?
zh.summary: 该文章讨论了以父母名义为孙子女建立经纪账户的注意事项,包括投资于多元化股票基金(包括标普500指数)。它探讨了这种方法的潜在风险和财务影响。

title: Michael Dell courted Trump early. His company has reaped rewards
summary: Michael Dell's early courtship of Trump has resulted in business rewards for his company, exemplifying how corporations are seeking favor with the president in his second term. The trend represents a departure from traditional big business philanthropy norms.
content: The dynamic is emblematic of how business is seeking to sow favor with the president in his second term, and has departed from the norms of big business philanthropy.

zh.title: 迈克尔·戴尔早期讨好特朗普。他的公司收获了回报
zh.summary: 迈克尔·戴尔早期讨好特朗普为他的公司带来了商业回报,说明了企业如何在总统第二任期内寻求总统的青睐。这一趋势代表了与传统大企业慈善规范的背离。

title: ‘I’m unsure of the best approach’: My father, 91, is in hospice care. He left his six children CDs. Can we cash out?
summary: The article addresses a family's question about liquidating CDs left by their 91-year-old father currently in hospice care, with a banker suggesting liquidation may be easier after his passing. It explores the financial and timing considerations around inherited certificates of deposit.
content: “His banker suggested that it might be easier after my father’s passing if we liquidate all of the CDs.”

zh.title: 我不确定最佳方法：我91岁的父亲正在接受临终关怀，他留给六个孩子CD。我们能提前支取吗？
zh.summary: 这篇文章讨论了一个家庭关于提取其91岁父亲留下的定期存单的问题，该父亲目前正在接受临终关怀。一位银行家建议在父亲去世后提取可能更容易。文章探讨了继承定期存单的财务和时间考虑因素。

title: My golf buddy dropped me when I didn’t make him my financial adviser. Be careful who you trust.
summary: The article warns about the risks of trusting a friend with financial management decisions, illustrating how personal relationships can blur professional boundaries. It emphasizes that friendliness is insufficient qualification for financial advisory roles.
content: “Friendliness alone is not a sufficient reason to trust someone with your finances.”

zh.title: 当我没有让高尔夫球友做我的财务顾问时，他就与我断绝了关系。要小心你信任的人。
zh.summary: 这篇文章警告了信任朋友进行财务管理决策的风险，说明个人关系如何会模糊专业界限。它强调友好不足以担任财务顾问的角色。

title: Costco issues a lukewarm quarter, but delivers on the metric that matters most
summary: Costco delivered a mixed quarter with results below expectations on some metrics while performing well on key indicators. The company demonstrated continued resilience in consumer spending despite economic headwinds.
content: It was not the best quarter, but far from bad.

zh.title: Costco发布平淡季度业绩，但在最关键指标上表现突出
zh.summary: Costco本季度成绩喜忧参半，部分指标表现不及预期，但在关键指标上表现良好。尽管面临经济逆风，公司在消费支出方面仍展现了持续的韧性。

title: Dell stock soars toward another record high as the AI boom drives a big earnings beat
summary: Dell posted a massive earnings beat with AI-server revenue surging 757% year-over-year, marking the company's strongest profit performance in at least five years. The results underscore Dell's strategic positioning to capitalize on accelerating AI infrastructure demand.
content: The company’s AI-server revenue was up 757% in the first quarter, while profit beat expectations by the widest margin in at least five years.

zh.title: 受AI热潮驱动，戴尔股价再创历史新高，业绩大幅超预期
zh.summary: 戴尔公布了大幅超预期的业绩，AI服务器收入同比激增757%，这是公司至少五年来最强劲的盈利表现。这些成果凸显了戴尔战略性定位以抓住加速的AI基础设施需求的能力。

title: Okta shares rise on earnings beat and AI-agent opportunity
summary: Okta exceeded earnings expectations in its first quarter and identified a significant emerging market opportunity in AI-agent identity management. The company's positive outlook reflects growing demand for security solutions as enterprises deploy AI agents at scale.
content: Okta’s first-qarter earnings cleared Wall Street’s expectations, and the company believes a massive market for AI-agent identity management is brewing on the horizon.

zh.title: Okta因业绩超预期和AI代理机遇而股价上涨
zh.summary: Okta在第一季度超额完成收益预期，并在AI代理身份管理领域发现了显著的新兴市场机会。公司积极的前景反映了随着企业大规模部署AI代理，对安全解决方案需求的增长。

title: Asia markets rise as investors weigh Iran military activity against signs of temporary U.S.-Iran deal
summary: Asian stock markets advanced as investors balanced concerns about escalating Iran military activity with hopes for a temporary U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement. The positive sentiment signals growing confidence that diplomatic solutions may prevent further geopolitical disruption.
content: Asia-Pacific markets rose as investors shrugged off renewed Iran tensions against ceasefire optimism.

zh.title: 亚洲市场上升，投资者权衡伊朗军事活动与美伊临时协议迹象
zh.summary: 亚洲股市上涨，投资者在对伊朗军事活动升级的担忧与对美伊临时停火协议的希望之间寻求平衡。积极情绪表明投资者越来越相信外交解决方案可能会阻止进一步的地缘政治混乱。

title: Tesla Robotaxi fleet in Texas less than one-tenth size of Waymo's, filings reveal
summary: Tesla's registered autonomous vehicle fleet in Texas consists of just 42 vehicles, significantly smaller than competitor Waymo's operations in the state. The disparity highlights Tesla's slower deployment of its Robotaxi service despite long-standing promises.
content: Tesla has registered 42 automated vehicles in its driverless Robotaxi service in Texas, putting it far behind Waymo in the state.

zh.title: 文件显示特斯拉在德州的机器人出租车车队规模不到Waymo的十分之一
zh.summary: 特斯拉在德州注册的自动驾驶车队仅包含42辆车，远小于竞争对手Waymo在该州的运营规模。这种差异凸显了特斯拉在长期承诺的机器人出租车服务部署中进展缓慢。

title: Stock futures are little changed as traders eye developments in Middle East: Live updates
summary: U.S. stock markets hit fresh closing highs, driven by strength in the technology sector as traders balanced Middle East geopolitical developments. The broad market gains reflect continued investor confidence despite ongoing international tensions.
content: Boosted by a rally in the tech sector, all three major averages rose to fresh closing highs on Thursday.

zh.title: 股指期货小幅变动，交易员关注中东发展：实时更新
zh.summary: 美国股市创历史收盘新高，由科技板块强势推动，交易员平衡中东地缘政治发展。广泛的市场涨幅反映了投资者尽管面临持续国际紧张局势仍保持信心。
